title: Error when running bash inside container
body:
```
[vagrant@localhost buildah]$ git rev-parse HEAD
2048c74819df152877183be35ab9358ec4fff534
[vagrant@localhost buildah]$ sudo buildah from centos:7
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:343b0936103607602d236363460c0368a1cad0ef58a534d5a5c2ecd9f8c2f3dd
 67.12 MiB / 67.26 MiB [=======================================================]
Copying config sha256:8140d0c64310d4e290bf3938757837dbb8f806acba0cb3f6a852558074345348
 0 B / 1.79 KiB [--------------------------------------------------------------]
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
centos-working-container
[vagrant@localhost buildah]$ sudo buildah containers
CONTAINER ID IMAGE ID     IMAGE NAME CONTAINER NAME
cc12d1d03918 1ac05484924e centos:7   centos-working-container
[vagrant@localhost buildah]$ sudo buildah run cc12d1d03918 /bin/sh
json: cannot unmarshal object into Go value of type []string
```

comments.body: Which version of runc do you have installed (`runc --version`)?  We use it to handle `run` commands and `RUN` instructions in Dockerfiles, and the format of the configuration that we create for it had some not-backward-compatible changes land in the last few versions.  The version of the runtime spec that `buildah` currently uses is 1.0.0-rc5.
I do not appear to have runc installed. It's not part of any of the install instructions. Should it be?

```
[root@localhost ~]# buildah from fedora:25
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:691bc14ee27487db536172a1fcdbbf956f460d1e1e1b201828e3a2bab81c5ec8
 72.10 MiB / 72.22 MiB [=======================================================]
Copying config sha256:15895ef0b3b2b4e61bf03d38f82b42011ff7f226c681705a4022ae3d1d643888
 0 B / 2.29 KiB [--------------------------------------------------------------]
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
fedora-working-container
[root@localhost ~]# buildah containers
CONTAINER ID IMAGE ID     IMAGE NAME CONTAINER NAME
832c55b9ab39 4742dd78929d fedora:25  fedora-working-container
[root@localhost ~]# buildah run 832c55b9ab39 /bin/sh
json: cannot unmarshal object into Go value of type []string
[root@localhost ~]# rpm -q runc
runc-1.0.0-5.rc2.gitc91b5be.fc25.x86_64
[root@localhost ~]# cat /etc/fedora-release 
Fedora release 25 (Twenty Five)

```

So fc25 doesn't have the version of runc needed?

If this helps...

```
[root@localhost ~]# buildah --debug run 832c55b9ab39 /bin/sh
INFO[0000] [graphdriver] using prior storage driver "overlay2" 
DEBU[0000] using "/tmp/buildah016828953" to hold bundle data


json: cannot unmarshal object into Go value of type []string
DEBU[0000] error running runc [/bin/sh]: exit status 1  
DEBU[0000] error running [/bin/sh] in container "fedora-working-container": exit status 1 

```

Okay, upgraded to rc5 and it worked. Leaving this open in the case you want to use it as an opportunity to version-check dependencies, make error message more informative, or add documentation of the requirement. Thanks!
